name: One Pot Pork Chop Supper
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon caraway seed or oregano, optional
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown the pork chops. Pour off any excess fat.
2. Add the tomato soup, water, Worcestershire sauce, salt, and caraway (or oregano) to the skillet.
3. Add the potatoes and carrots to the skillet.
4. Cover and simmer for 45 minutes or until the pork is tender.
